programme.title: Presence
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, the Paynes settle down in an old house, disturbing an entity that watches their every move. 2024. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Born just minutes apart, Minnie and Quinn were driven apart by time, will fate bring them back together? 2024. UK. Director: Nick Moore. Starring: Sophie Cookson, Lucien Laviscount.

programme.title: Obvious: AI Art Pioneers
programme.desc: Three French artists break into the art scene without touching a single paint brush, selling art completely generated by AI. 2023. France. Director: Thibaut Seve.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 7/6. Weather takes a turn for the worse as a blizzard snows the gang in at the all-you-can-eat carvery. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Leon Lopez. Starring: Neil Ashton, Dylan Baldwin S7 E6.

programme.title: Trespasses
programme.desc: 1/1. Cushla is stuck between two worlds, which is made no easier by Michael's arrival at her bar. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Dawn Shadforth. Starring: Lola Petticrew, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Solitude
programme.desc: An old farmer forms an unlikely friendship with a young paper boy. 2023. Iceland. Director: Ninna Palmadottir. Starring: Þrostur Leo Gunnarsson, Hermann Samuelsson, Anna Gunndis Guðmundsdottir.

programme.title: Tornado
programme.desc: Armed with her her father's Samurai training and a thirst for revenge, Tornado leaves a trail of blood and destruction in her wake. 2025. UK. Director: John Maclean. Starring: Koki, Nathan Malone.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Prime Minister Winston Churchill. 1976. UK, USA. Director: John Sturges. Starring: Michael Caine, Donald Sutherland, Robert Duvall.

programme.title: I Am The River, The River Is Me
programme.desc: Ned Tapa takes a group on a canoe trip down the Whanganui River, the first river in the world recognised as a legal person. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Petr Lom.
